CREATE TABLE test_graph (id INTEGER, data BLOB, format VARCHAR(10));
INSERT INTO test_graph (id, data, format) VALUES (1, 'example', 'rdf/xml');
INSERT INTO test_graph (id, data, format) VALUES (2, '<http://example.org/>', 'ttl');
INSERT INTO test_graph (id, data, format) VALUES (3, '<rdf>some data</rdf>', 'nq');
SELECT * FROM test_graph WHERE format IN ('ttl', 'rdf/xml');
SELECT id FROM test_graph WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_graph);
DELETE FROM test_graph WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_graph WHERE format = 'ttl';
rdf_loader_run();
rdf_loader_run('file://path/to/file.ttl');
rdf_loader_run('file://path/to/file.nt');
rdf_loader_run('file://path/to/file.xml', TRUE);
SELECT * FROM test_graph WHERE format = (SELECT format FROM test_graph WHERE id = 2);
SELECT id FROM test_graph WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_graph WHERE format = 'rdf/xml') AND id < 3;
INSERT INTO test_graph (id, data, format) SELECT MAX(id) + 1, data, format FROM test_graph;
rdf_loader_run('file://path/to/nested_file.rdf');
CREATE TABLE new_graph AS SELECT * FROM test_graph WHERE format = 'ttl';
SELECT id, data FROM test_graph WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM new_graph) ORDER BY id DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT format FROM test_graph WHERE format IS NOT NULL;
DROP TABLE test_graph;
